description_long: This is a modern grave monument set on a rectangular stone base, featuring a two-tone upright headstone with a distinctive geometric design. The headstone is composed of a light gray marble slab with a rounded top on one side and a taller, black granite slab with a straight edge on the other, creating a striking visual contrast. The grave cover is also made of gray marble, with a black granite accent running along one side, and is slightly elevated above the main base. The base itself is a thick, rectangular slab of light gray stone, providing stability and a clean border around the grave. A small, engraved cross is visible on the black granite portion of the headstone, adding a religious element to the design. The overall appearance is sleek, contemporary, and solemn, suitable for a modern urban cemetery.
description: A modern grave monument with a two-tone marble and granite headstone, geometric design, and engraved cross, set on a rectangular stone base.
description_view_0: Front view showing the contrasting gray marble and black granite headstone with a rounded and straight edge, and the rectangular stone base.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thickness of the headstone and the layered structure of the grave cover and base.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the headstone, the engraved cross on the black granite, and the full length of the grave cover.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the profile of the headstone and the layered grave cover atop the stone base.
